content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based selloff: NIFTY -1.11%, BANKNIFTY -1.04%, AUTO -1.57%, REALTY -1.78%, ENERGY -1.43%; India VIX spiked +10.75% to 18.65 signaling elevated risk-off. IT and Pharma showing relative resilience as defensive plays. Multiple held names showing strength on Q4 results (PNBHOUSING +3.77%, COFORGE +6.44%, DABUR +3.77%, PIDILITIND +1.77%, LAURUSLABS +1.81%, WOCKPHARMA +1.89% after gap up). New entries restricted; focus on trailing SLs on winners.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.2% unrealized winner. CMP 1091.20, current SL 1073.10 is already locked in well above entry 984 (~+9% locked profit). SL sits 1.7% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. No change needed; current SL is appropriate. Emitting HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override the MODIFY above — SL/target unchanged, so HOLD is correct. +10.2% unrealized, SL 1073.10 already locks ~+9% gain. Bullish Q4, brokerage upgrades to Rs 1350. Let it run toward target 1135."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF safe-haven holding. -1.1% unrealized at CMP 124.31, SL 121.00 (-2.7% gap). VIX spike +10.75% supports gold thesis. Hold to target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (820 = entry). CMP 831.30, ~1.4% gap to SL — acceptable. No change; SL/target unchanged. Emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY — values unchanged, so HOLD. +1.8%, SL at breakeven 820, FMCG defensive rotation supportive (DABUR +3.77% read-across). Q4 was strong (+22% rev, +18% PAT). Let it work toward 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.5% winner on Q4 beat. SL 1352 vs CMP 1368.10 — only 1.2% gap, BELOW the 1% trail-gap discipline floor of needing ≥1% below LTP. Actually 1352/1368 = 1.18%, just inside floor. Keep SL at 1352 to protect +7.4% locked gain. No change; emitting HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.5% winner. SL 1352 already locks ~7.4% gain (gap to CMP 1368 = 1.18%, within trail-gap floor). IT defensive sector tailwind, FY27 margin guidance >20.5%. Hold to target 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% unrealized, CMP 3051.30 above SL 3000 (~1.7% buffer). Defence sector with structural Rs 17,000 cr order book, FY26 PAT +41.8%. Hold to target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at 820 (above entry 806). CMP 836.30, 2% gap. Values unchanged — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.6%, SL 820 above entry, locks +1.7%. Q4 record revenue, bullish OI surge, investor meets May 15/26/27 as catalysts. Hold to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.4% at CMP 1476, SL 1465 (0.7% gap). Q4 results May 7 were strong (+37% PAT, EBITDA +310bps). CMP recovering toward entry. Hold; SL respects thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% small winner. SL 1580 vs CMP 1606.50 (1.7% gap). Research flags neutral (-0.05 modifier) but Zaynich USFDA mid-2026 catalyst remains. SL appropriate; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 2780.80, SL 2755 (~0.9% gap). Q4 PAT +47%, Rs 2,300 cr refrigerant capex catalyst. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 9083 vs SL 9020 (0.7% gap, tight but Q4 was best-ever, Rs 47 dividend, Citi target 10500). Thesis fully intact. Hold; let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, CMP 1989.70 vs SL 1955 (1.8% gap). Q4 strong ex one-off, FY27 25% rev growth guidance, defense order book Rs 10,961 cr. Hold to target 2110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.5%, CMP 362.95 vs SL 354 (2.5% gap). BFSI sector under pressure today on broad selloff, but Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie target 415. Thesis intact; respect the SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, CMP 10711.50 vs SL 10440 (2.5% gap). Q4 strong, ~Rs 5,633 Cr buyback at Rs 12000/share is a major support, Rs 150 dividend. Auto sector weak today but stock holding +1% on 3.1x volume — outperforming sector. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1%, CMP 487.70 vs SL 472 (3.2% gap). Q4 beat, raised FY27 India guidance, FMCG rotation strong today (+3.77%). Thesis fully intact; hold to target 510."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, CMP 1228.30 vs SL 1190 (3.1% gap). Q4 results pending in May = binary event in <3 sessions — per Rule 11, should consider risk-trim. However, position size only 1.95% of capital (16 sh × 1226 = Rs 19,616), well under 5% event-trade cap, so binary tail is contained. Kotak Sell with target 800 is a real overhang but offset by ex-dividend May 8 and ATH momentum. Hold with current SL; size is the event-trade hedge."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1073.10, "reasoning": "SL already locks +9%, well-positioned."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Safe-haven thesis intact with VIX spike."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, FMCG tailwind."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1352.00, "reasoning": "SL locks +7.4% gain, IT defensive."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3000.00, "reasoning": "Defence structural; let SL do its job."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "SL above entry, bullish catalysts ahead."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1465.00, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, price recovering toward entry."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Small winner, Zaynich optionality intact."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2755.00, "reasoning": "Capex catalyst, Q4 PAT +47%."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9020.00, "reasoning": "Best-ever Q4, brokerages bullish."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "Defense + 25% FY27 guidance."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 354.00, "reasoning": "Q4 strong; respect SL on BFSI selloff day."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 10440.00, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at Rs 12000 supports."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 472.00, "reasoning": "FMCG leader rotation strong today."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1190.00, "reasoning": "Size 1.95% — within event-trade hedge envelope despite Q4 binary pending."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewed all qualifying BULLISH candidates per Rule 18:\n- POLYCAB (+0.10), DABUR (+0.12), CAMS (+0.10), ABCAPITAL (+0.12), BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.15), PIDILITIND (+0.10), SRF (+0.10), BHARATFORG (+0.08), PNBHOUSING (+0.10), COFORGE (+0.08), MARICO (+0.08), GRSE (+0.10): ALREADY HELD — cannot re-buy without breaching position caps.\n- THERMAX, NUVAMA, FINCABLES, NBCC, BERGEPAINT, TITAN, APOLLOHOSP, SUNPHARMA, INFY, PERSISTENT, HCLTECH: not provided in deep-dive data this cycle, cannot evaluate without research.\n- CARTRADE (+0.08): +17% rally May 7, small-cap volatility (analyst valuation concerns), post-rally chase setup poor R:R; skip.\n- BERGEPAINT: Q4 results May 12 (binary, <3 sessions) + crude $104 input cost overhang — Rule 11 disqualifies new BUY.\n- HFCL: pending MIS LIMIT @ 133.50 has been OPEN for 7,476 minutes (~5 days) — stale, CANCEL.\nDeployment 65%, cash 35% (~Rs 352K). Soft target is 80% but on a -1.1% NIFTY / VIX +10.75% risk-off day with FII data 0 and CPI print pending Tuesday, holding the existing book without adding correlated exposure is the right defensive posture. Will reassess if VIX cools.",
  "portfolio_notes": "15 CNC positions already running, 65% deployed — close to soft target after accounting for risk-off macro. Book is well-diversified across IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO, DABUR), Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS), Chemicals (SRF, PIDILITIND), Capital Goods (GRSE, POLYCAB), and Gold ETF hedge (GOLDBEES). Sector tags well under 35% cap. Unrealized +Rs 7,919 today; key winners PNBHOUSING (+10.2%) and COFORGE (+8.5%) have SLs locking gains. VIX spike to 18.65 + broad selloff argues against adding fresh correlated long exposure — defensive posture is justified by tape, not anchoring. Will cancel stale HFCL pending order next opportunity (not surfaced as separate cancel decision in this schema)."
}
